query:
SELECT domain, COUNT(*) as seeded, 
  CASE domain
    WHEN 'deal_screening' THEN 75
    WHEN 'wealth_management' THEN 75
    WHEN 'insurance_underwriting' THEN 60
    WHEN 'mvno_intelligence' THEN 50
    WHEN 'legal_review' THEN 50
    WHEN 'budget_forecasting' THEN 50
    WHEN 'social_media' THEN 50
    WHEN 'ic_reports' THEN 50
  END as target,
  CASE domain
    WHEN 'deal_screening' THEN 75
    WHEN 'wealth_management' THEN 75
    WHEN 'insurance_underwriting' THEN 60
    WHEN 'mvno_intelligence' THEN 50
    WHEN 'legal_review' THEN 50
    WHEN 'budget_forecasting' THEN 50
    WHEN 'social_media' THEN 50
    WHEN 'ic_reports' THEN 50
  END - COUNT(*) as missing
FROM knowledge_scenarios 
GROUP BY domain 
ORDER BY domain;
